# Minifylinks

> Minifylinks is a free URL shortener that allows users to create short, branded links instantly without signup. It provides advanced analytics, QR code generation, and permanent links for marketers, businesses, and creators.

## About
- **Website:** https://minifylinks.com/
- **Business Type:** URL Shortener / Link Management Tool
- **Category:** SaaS, Marketing Tool, SEO Tool
- **Service Area:** Global

## Core Features
- Free URL shortening (no hidden cost)
- Custom branded short links
- Click tracking & analytics (device, location, referrer)
- QR code generation for each link
- Permanent links (no expiration)
- No signup required for basic use
- Fast redirection (low latency)
- HTTPS secure links

## Use Cases
- Social media marketing (Instagram, Twitter, TikTok)
- Affiliate marketing & tracking
- Email campaigns
- Offline marketing (QR codes)
- SEO link management
- Content creators & influencers

## Target Audience
- Digital marketers
- Bloggers & content creators
- Small businesses
- Agencies
- Developers (basic usage)

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://minifylinks.com/): Primary Tool / SaaS Homepage
- [Blog](https://minifylinks.com/blog): Knowledge Base & SEO Guides
- [FAQs](https://minifylinks.com/faqs): Frequently Asked Questions

## Trust & Security
- Secure HTTPS platform
- Fast global link redirection
- Accurate click analytics
- Free and transparent usage model
- Built for marketers & businesses worldwide
- No spam or unsafe redirect policy
- Scalable cloud-based infrastructure
